global_description: A cylindrical percussion instrument with a hollow body, typically made of wood or metal, and a taut membrane stretched across the top. The body is often polished or painted, and the membrane is usually white or light-colored. Drums can vary in size but generally have a circular shape.

part_details.body: Cylindrical, often polished or painted, made of wood or metal
part_details.membrane: Taut, usually white or light-colored, stretched across the top
part_details.rim: Circular, often metallic, securing the membrane
part_details.shell: Hollow, resonant, forming the main structure

spatial_relations: Membrane stretched across top of body
